context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: We have tail_sampling configured in our daemonset otel-agent. We're seeing that many of our traces come through incomple

checklist.name: explains-that-tail-sampling-cannot-live-on-da
checklist.description: Explains that tail sampling cannot live on daemonset agents because each agent only sees spans from its own node — a single trace is split across agents and the sampler makes decisions on partial data. Recommends moving tail_sampling to a central gateway tier, fed via a `loadbalancing` exporter that routes by `trace_id` so all spans for a trace land on the same gateway replica.
